title: Iran Threatens OpenAI's UAE Data Center
summary: Iran's IRGC has threatened OpenAI's Abu Dhabi data center in response to potential US attacks on Iranian power plants. The IRGC vows to annihilate US-linked energy and tech companies in the region.
body:
The Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) of Iran has published a video threatening OpenAI's planned data center in Abu Dhabi, UAE. The threat is in response to the US considering attacks on Iranian power plants. The video, published on an Iranian state-backed news outlet's social media account, shows an image of OpenAI's $30 billion Stargate data center, currently under construction.

 The IRGC's threat is a significant escalation in the region, with the group vowing to carry out the "complete and utter annihilation" of US-linked energy and technology companies. This move has implications for the stability of the region and the safety of international businesses operating there. The threat also highlights the complex geopolitical landscape surrounding Iran and the US.

 The reaction to the threat has been muted so far, but it is likely to prompt a response from the US and its allies. The future of OpenAI's data center and other US-linked businesses in the region remains uncertain. As tensions between Iran and the US continue to rise, the situation will be closely monitored for any developments or further escalation.
